title: xAI Voice API Documentation
citation: xAI Docs. Voice API Reference. Accessed 2026-05-03.
permitted_uses: API integration planning for real-time voice, streaming TTS, and streaming STT.
claims_supported: xAI documents real-time voice conversations with Grok models via WebSocket.
xAI documents streaming TTS and streaming STT endpoints.
xAI documents optional speaker diarization for STT.
claims_not_supported: That xAI data processing terms satisfy OpenClinXR institutional compliance without legal and security review.
That xAI WebSocket transport eliminates the need for OpenClinXR trace and audit controls.
